posts.text:
Ever since the implosion of Afghanistan, the U.S. and our allies are facing a myriad of threats — from the Iranian regime, to Russia's war on Ukraine, to China’s aggression in the Indo-pacific.

At today's @HouseForeignGOP hearing, I spoke with @USDASDuffey about whether our weapons stockpiles are ready to meet the challenge of modern warfare.

Video
Tune in now! I’m joining @FoxNewsSunday LIVE in five minutes to discuss the latest on Operation Epic Fury, Democrats’ DHS shutdown, and more.

I am immensely grateful that it seems the suspect was the only casualty in this evil attack.

I’ve worked for years to fully fund the national security grant program, which provides resources to secure houses of faith — a pressing need amidst today’s heightened threat environment. 

I commend Temple Israel’s security officers, who took swift action to protect the community, as well as the law enforcement officers who remain at the scene. My prayers are with all those involved.


The Wall Street

The military objectives for Operation Epic Fury—dismantling Iran's missile & drone production, destroying their Navy to open the strait of Hormuz, & ensuring they never have a nuclear weapon—are achievable. I joined @CNN to discuss the military's success & what could come next.

Video

Having served as the lead congressional investigator for the Boston Marathon bombing, I know that what happened in New York could have been far, far worse. Today on @Newsnation, I discussed the @NYPD's heroic response and the heightened threat environment facing our nation.

Video

It was a tremendous honor to visit Dharamshala and personally tell the Dalai Lama and his people that the U.S. has not forgotten their plight. We will continue to firmly stand with Tibetans against the CCP's ongoing oppression until they can safely return to their homeland.

Sixty-seven years ago today, the Tibetan people bravely rose up to defend their freedom, religion, and way of life. The Chinese Communist Party responded with a violent crackdown that forced thousands into exile. But to this day, Tibetans' commitment to peace and perseverance reminds us that even if the CCP takes away your land, they cannot crush your culture or your spirit.

For years as the top Republican on @HouseForeignGOP, I led efforts to expose the horrific impacts of Havana syndrome on innocent Americans who were simply serving their country. Far too often, our efforts were ignored or rebuffed by the Biden administration and the intelligence community.

This report finally exposes the truth that victims of Havana syndrome have known for years: This was an attack by a foreign adversary. It should have been treated seriously when it first happened, but I am gra

This is an intolerable escalation by the Kremlin — one they must come to deeply regret. I call on the administration to impose swift and severe consequences for this blatant attempt to endanger American lives. washingtonpost.com/national-…

I have long warned that Russia and Iran are locked in an unholy alliance; you cannot bifurcate the two. Iran armed Russia with lethal drones to massacre Ukrainians, and now Putin is reportedly returning the favor by providing Iran with intelligence meant to help target and kill Americans. Once again, Putin is making clear that he has no respect for President Trump's sincere efforts to secure peace in Ukraine or elsewhere.

With the first FIFA World Cup game less than 100 days away, now is the time to urgently secure venues, counter drone threats, and coordinate law enforcement activity. Yet Democrats’ DHS shutdown has put much of that vital preparation on pause.

In today’s elevated threat environment, the stakes are simply far too high for partisan games.


Fox News Sports (@FoxNewsSports_)

Senate Dems refusing to budge on DHS funding may cause headache for World Cup travelers
foxnews.com/sports/senate-de…




—

The Iranian regime's legacy of American bloodshed stretches back nearly five decades—from bombing our Marine barracks in Beirut to backing Hamas' October 7 attack that killed 46 Americans. I urged Congress to stand with the president to finally close this dark chapter of history:

Video

Iran's decision to hit our partners in the Middle East was a severe miscalculation, turning the Gulf nations against them. Meanwhile, Iran's so-called "allies" — Russia and China — have abandoned them. 

Iran is now an island.

Video

190 years ago today, the Texas Declaration of Independence was signed at Washington-on-the-Brazos in #TX10. I'm proud to represent the birthplace of our great state and will always fight for Texas values.

Happy Texas Independence Day!
